description: You are the Safety Director at Summit Construction Group. Create a professional one-page 'Site Safety Alert' bulletin regarding Winter Weather Hazards using the draft text in '/home/ga/Documents/safety_draft.txt' and assets in '/home/ga/Documents/assets/'. The document must feature a single-column layout for the headline ('SITE SAFETY ALERT') and subtitle at the top, while the rest of the body text is formatted into two columns. Incorporate the image 'hazard_photo.jpg' with text wrapping, apply bullet points to the 'Key Precautions' list, and place the 'IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED' section inside a bordered box. Save the final document as '/home/ga/Documents/Winter_Safety_Alert.odt'.
